Don't add any comments to the code you generate.
Please use this color scheme:
Backgrounds & Surfaces

#0A0A0A — Primary Background
#1A1A1A — Surface / card
#111111 — Announcement bar
#2A2A2A — Border & divider

Tipografi

#FFFFFF — Primary text & headline
#F5F5F5 — Subheading
#A0A0A0 — Muted / body text
#666666 — Subtle / caption

Tombol (CTA)

#F5F0E8 — Primary CTA
#E8E0D0 — Sign up button
#2A2A2A — Secondary CTA
#444444 — Log in button

Aksen Visual

#FFFFFF with glow — Ilustrasi hexagon / brand accent

Please make sure the UI is responsive in all screen sizes, from mobile to desktop. Use media queries to adjust the layout and typography as needed.

Don't use vanilla CSS for styling. Instead, use Tailwind CSS utility classes to implement the design. This will help maintain consistency and make it easier to manage styles across the project.
